fields.title: [viewer-api][ticket-viewer] Add optional 2D graph mode and presentation keyframing

fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. Users can switch between current 3D mode and an explicit 2D graph mode. 2. The 2D mode uses a fixed planar camera and matching 2D grid presentation. 3. Presentation keyframing works for both automatic selection-triggered and explicit user-invoked activation. 4. Temporary presentation layouts restore the prior arrangement predictably. 5. 2D mode, keyframed presentation, and restore behavior are covered by browser and Playwright validation.
fields.title: [viewer-api][ticket-viewer] Add optional 2D graph mode and presentation keyframing

fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. Users can switch between current 3D mode and an explicit 2D graph mode. 2. The 2D mode uses a fixed planar camera, matching 2D grid presentation, and flat-point minimal node glyphs. 3. Presentation keyframing works for both explicit user invocation and selection-triggered automatic activation. 4. Automatic keyframing is configurable in settings so selection-triggered behavior can be enabled, disabled, or tuned. 5. Temporary presentation layouts restore the prior arrangement predictably. 6. Browser and Playwright validation cover 2D mode, explicit keyframing, auto-keyframing settings behavior, and restore semantics.
fields.title: [viewer-api][ticket-viewer] Add optional 2D graph mode and presentation keyframing
